summary: Comprehensive UAT and Production Readiness Audit for visionary-qa.preview.emergentagent.com completed. All critical functionalities tested including public pages, authentication, generators, billing, admin panel, and mobile responsiveness. MAJOR FIX VERIFIED: Terms of Service page now has content (8881 chars) - P2 bug from iteration_111 is FIXED.

minor.issue: CORS still set to allow-origin: * - Should be restricted to specific origins in production

minor.impact: LOW - analytics may not function but app works

console_warnings.issue: React hydration warning about span inside tbody - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

public_pages.landing: PASS - Hero section visible, '5-10s Reel Generation', '30-90s Story Pack', '100 Free Credits on Signup'
public_pages.pricing: PASS - All 7 pricing tiers displayed (4 subscriptions + 3 credit packs), currency selector working
public_pages.login: PASS - Email, Password, Google SSO, Forgot password link
public_pages.signup: PASS - Full validation, password requirements shown
public_pages.privacy_policy: PASS - 8287 chars, Last Updated: February 19, 2026, comprehensive policy
public_pages.terms_of_service: PASS - 8881 chars, Last Updated: February 28, 2026, complete ToS with sections (P2 BUG FROM ITERATION_111 FIXED)

authentication.demo_login: PASS - demo@example.com / Password123! works via API and UI
authentication.admin_login: PASS - admin@creatorstudio.ai / Cr3@t0rStud!o#2026 works via API and UI

generators.reel_generator: PASS - Topic, Niche, Tone, Duration, Language, Goal, Audience fields. 10 credits per reel. Generate button works.
generators.story_generator: PASS - Age Group, Genre, Number of Scenes fields. 6-10 credits. NO 'Credits Exhausted' bug

user_pages.my_downloads: PASS - Downloads page loads with 'Download Expiry Notice' (5 minutes)
user_pages.billing: PASS - 4 subscription plans + 3 credit packs, Subscribe/Buy Now buttons
user_pages.history: PASS - Generation history page loads with stats (Total Generations, Reels Created, Stories Created, Credits Used)

admin_panel.admin_dashboard: PASS - 23 Total Users, 23 Visitors, 22 Active Sessions, 190 Generations, ₹0 Revenue, 100% Satisfaction
admin_panel.admin_users: PASS - User management table with 23 users, Create User, Reset, Unlimited actions available
admin_panel.feature_requests: PASS - Feature requests page loads with voting system

payment_integration.cashfree_health: PASS - Gateway healthy, configured in TEST environment
payment_integration.cashfree_create_order: PASS - Order created successfully with paymentSessionId returned

mobile_responsiveness.320px_landing: PASS - No horizontal scroll, hamburger menu visible
mobile_responsiveness.375px_login: PASS - Form elements visible and functional
mobile_responsiveness.768px_landing: PASS - No horizontal scroll, full navigation visible
mobile_responsiveness.768px_dashboard: PASS - No horizontal scroll, 2-column grid for feature cards

api_endpoints.auth_login: PASS - Returns token and user info
api_endpoints.cashfree_create_order: PASS - Creates order with payment session

previous_bugs_status.P2_terms_page_blank_iteration111: FIXED - Terms page now has 8881 characters of legal content
previous_bugs_status.CORS_permissive: STILL OPEN - CORS set to allow-origin: *
previous_bugs_status.CSP_cloudflare_blocked: STILL OPEN - CSP blocks Cloudflare analytics

action_items: OPTIONAL: Restrict CORS origins in production (currently allow-origin: *)
OPTIONAL: Update CSP to allow Cloudflare analytics if needed
OPTIONAL: Fix React hydration warning in AdminUsersManagement component
critical_code_review_comments: Terms of Service page bug from iteration_111 has been FIXED
Both admin and demo credentials verified working
Mobile responsiveness is excellent across all tested viewports
Cashfree payment integration working in TEST mode
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo and admin users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comprehensive UAT complete. All major functionality verified working. Terms page bug FIXED. Admin login uses admin@creatorstudio.ai (NOT krajapraveen). Cashfree payment in TEST mode. All generators, billing, admin panel, mobile responsiveness confirmed working. Minor issues: CORS *, CSP blocks Cloudflare analytics, React hydration warning.

final_verdict.recommendation: Ready for production deployment. Minor CORS and CSP adjustments recommended but not blocking.
